message:
test(websocket): add handshake rejection tests and extract helper (bd-z09e)

- websocket_upgrade_rejects_missing_key: verifies 400 when
  Sec-WebSocket-Key is omitted
- websocket_upgrade_rejects_post_method: verifies non-101 when
  upgrade is attempted with POST instead of GET
- Extract spawn_ws_echo_server() helper for reuse across tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
